column1: FORECAST | Good morning! Sct'd storms return this afternoon providing some relief from the heat. Rain coverage could be a little higher than yesterday with the storms beginning a little earlier compared to Wednesday. Have a great day!
Traveling to st Pete Aug 3-9 do we think I’ll get any sun?
Rain Sunday and Monday from Tropical Depression Debby seems to be likely. but it rains most afternoons in that part of the country.
not bad , I just want at least a day or two of sun . Do you think it’s still worth the trip ?
It's up to you whether to travel. August in Florida means afternoon storms on some days, tropical depression coming or not.
It didn’t storm last night and I was out last night. I
